Arthur's Way 120 Benetti

Delivered in 2001 by Benetti, Arthur's Way features a timeless interior and generous deck spaces.

LOA120 ft (36.58 m)
Beam26 ft
Draft6 ft 6 in
Year2001
BuilderBenetti
ModelClassic 120
Staterooms6
Heads7
Engines2 x MTU 12V 1500 hp
Power1500 hp
LocationFort Lauderdale, FL
Price$8,250,000

Benetti Classic Highlights

  • CAT power with freshly serviced engines
  • Recent interior refresh with matte teak
  • US duty paid and charter ready

Arthur's Way benefits from a meticulous owner and comes with a complete toy package.
